title: LeadActivationRecord
description: Schema for lead activation records. An activation record is created when a scored record meets all activation gate criteria and is queued for HubSpot sync.

id.description: Unique identifier for this activation record.

contact_record_id.description: Foreign key to normalized_contacts.id, if a specific contact triggered activation.

activation_triggered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this activation was triggered.

activation_score.description: Score at time of activation. Must be >= 70 per activation gate criteria.

activation_score_signals.description: Score signal snapshot at time of activation.

status.description: Current status of this activation record.

hubspot_company_id.description: HubSpot company ID assigned after successful sync.

hubspot_contact_id.description: HubSpot contact ID assigned after successful sync.

hubspot_deal_id.description: HubSpot deal ID if a deal was created.

failure_count.description: Number of sync attempts that have failed.

sync_log_id.description: Foreign key to hubspot_sync_log.id for the most recent sync attempt.
